text:
I have been added app-defaults install to xrubik port.
I've also improve Makefile as it follows to the format of 
Mr. Asami's Makefile example. Please take a look.

ftp://ftp.noc.titech.ac.jp/pub/tmp/aki/in.coming/xrubik.tgz
